accounted-by-year: how many times is it accounted per year
amortization-bank-data-error: Some information is missing for bank amortization
amortization-finalized: The property has already been completed or amortized
amortization-not-found: The product to be amortized could not be found
amortization-not-sold: The property is not sold or the sales document is missing
cant-delete-amortization: Amortization cannot be deleted. Contains amortized periods.
date-amortization-error: Error calculating the amortization date. Review the posting type and periods
date-end-amortization-error: The end of life date is missing or incorrect
first-period-calculation:
Full Period: Amortizes the total period regardless of the acquisition date.
Acquisition with distribution: Amortizes the first period from the acquisition, distributing the difference in the rest.
Acquisition and additional period: Amortizes the first period from the acquisition and the difference in an additional period.
line-amortized-entry-error: The amortized amount does not match the amount of the entry
mandatory-line-values-missing: Required values ​​(Year, Period and Amount) are missing in the amortization line
periods-help-title: Tables of maximum amortization periods in SPAIN
sell-invoice-description: ATTENTION: If NOT reported, a new document will be generated and the following values ​​must be entered.
subaccount-help-title: Subaccount tables for accounting for depreciation in SPAIN
